npis 0.0.0.9019
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Generate random NPIs

Source: R/utils.R
generate.Rd

Creates an integer vector of unvalidated NPIs.

Usage

generate(x = 10L, prop = 0.1, syntactic = TRUE)

Arguments

x

integer, number of NPIs to generate

prop

double; proportion of NAs to insert

syntactic

boolean; technically valid NPIs

Value

An integer vector of unvalidated NPIs

Examples

generate(100, 0.2, FALSE)
#>   [1] 1506436951 1578228714 1127089493 1749938745 1306627303 1062098073
#>   [7] 1191860649 1389764480 1524399543 1540412194         NA 1622827398
#>  [13]         NA 1096587785         NA 1246914758 1906345142         NA
#>  [19] 1631902327 1278511307 1080891805 1818929739         NA 1293504690
#>  [25]         NA 1947588470 1794331021 1674906793         NA 1280983164
#>  [31] 1242103270 1598381074 1289364428 1877803610 1903664012 1336936380
#>  [37]  127906112 1579461050         NA         NA  198224645 1102066553
#>  [43] 1430536036 1500579698 1385903890 1247208204 1613738640 1362480390
#>  [49]         NA 1135830640 1496284307 1313838060 1301891726 1078605882
#>  [55] 1186430342 1753490658 1846898350 1657967309         NA         NA
#>  [61] 1837682620 1733146485 1524475715  159487216 1250405868 1971721528
#>  [67] 1328193131         NA 1310377897 1424833468 1726770959  181548540
#>  [73]  182658219 1608752851 1832108855         NA  188688821         NA
#>  [79]         NA         NA 1490032642 1590161006 1566932184  176912675
#>  [85] 1288831513  190229833         NA 1599522777 1544546688 1359504701
#>  [91]  134954269 1808403158 1501602941 1689407199 1240259561         NA
#>  [97] 1997382246         NA 1999694160 1362555445
